use_cases: Personal portfolio landing page with animated text reveal on scroll
Developer portfolio hero section showcasing skills and bio
Creative professional showcase with modern scroll-triggered animations
Personal brand introduction with interactive navigation menu
ai_summary: A modern portfolio hero section featuring a sophisticated blur-to-reveal text animation that triggers on scroll using Intersection Observer. The component includes a reusable Button component and responsive navigation menu toggle functionality, making it ideal for personal portfolio and developer showcase pages with a clean, minimalist aesthetic.
